001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus;
002
003import org.apache.commons.lang3.Validate;
004import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic;
005import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.Message;
006import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType;
007import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.annotations.MessageProps;
008import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.helpers.Bytes;
009import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.models.KnownApiVersion;
010import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.CurrentEgvGuiDataV2Request;
011import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus.CurrentEGVGuiDataResponse.EGVStatus;
012
013/**
014 * Gets the current CGM reading (B variant).
015 * This response has the same 8-byte payload structure as CurrentEGVGuiDataResponse:
016 * - bytes 0-3: uint32 timestamp (seconds since pump epoch)
017 * - bytes 4-5: uint16 CGM reading
018 * - byte 6: uint8 EGV status
019 * - byte 7: uint8 trend rate
020 */
021/**
022 * Gets the current CGM reading (B variant).
023 * This response has the same 8-byte payload structure as CurrentEGVGuiDataResponse:
024 * - bytes 0-3: uint32 timestamp (seconds since pump epoch)
025 * - bytes 4-5: uint16 CGM reading
026 * - byte 6: uint8 EGV status
027 * - byte 7: uint8 trend rate
028 *
029
030 *
031 * <br>
032 *
033 * Response message for {@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.CurrentEgvGuiDataV2Request}, opCode -63, size 8
034 *
035 * <br>
036 *
037 * 
038 * <table border='1'>
039 * <caption>Message properties:</caption>
040 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>opCode</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>-63</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
041 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>size</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>8</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
042 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>type</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType#RESPONSE}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
043 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>characteristic</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic#CURRENT_STATUS}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
044 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>request</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.CurrentEgvGuiDataV2Request}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
045 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>minApi</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.models.KnownApiVersion#API_FUTURE}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
046 * </table>
047 */@MessageProps(
048    opCode=-63,
049    size=8,
050    type=MessageType.RESPONSE,
051    characteristic=Characteristic.CURRENT_STATUS,
052    request=CurrentEgvGuiDataV2Request.class,
053    minApi=KnownApiVersion.API_FUTURE
054)
055public class CurrentEgvGuiDataV2Response extends Message {
056
057    private long bgReadingTimestampSeconds;
058    private int cgmReading;
059    private int egvStatusId;
060    private EGVStatus egvStatus;
061    private int trendRate;
062
063    public CurrentEgvGuiDataV2Response() {}
064
065    public CurrentEgvGuiDataV2Response(long bgReadingTimestampSeconds, int cgmReading, int egvStatusId, int trendRate) {
066        this.cargo = buildCargo(bgReadingTimestampSeconds, cgmReading, egvStatusId, trendRate);
067        this.bgReadingTimestampSeconds = bgReadingTimestampSeconds;
068        this.cgmReading = cgmReading;
069        this.egvStatusId = egvStatusId;
070        this.egvStatus = getEgvStatus();
071        this.trendRate = trendRate;
072    }
073
074    /**
075     * <table border="1">
076     * <caption>Parsed fields for CurrentEgvGuiDataV2Response:</caption>
077     * <tr><td><code>bgReadingTimestampSeconds</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 0)</code></td></tr>
078     * <tr><td><code>cgmReading</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readShort(raw, 4)</code></td></tr>
079     * <tr><td><code>egvStatusId</code></td><td><code>raw[6]</code></td></tr>
080     * <tr><td><code>egvStatus</code></td><td><code>getEgvStatus()</code></td></tr>
081     * <tr><td><code>trendRate</code></td><td><code>raw[7]</code></td></tr>
082     * </table>
083     */
084    public void parse(byte[] raw) {
085        Validate.isTrue(raw.length == props().size());
086        this.cargo = raw;
087        this.bgReadingTimestampSeconds = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 0);
088        this.cgmReading = Bytes.readShort(raw, 4);
089        this.egvStatusId = raw[6];
090        this.egvStatus = getEgvStatus();
091        this.trendRate = raw[7];
092    }
093
094    /**
095     * <table border="1">
096     * <caption>Byte layout for CurrentEgvGuiDataV2Response.buildCargo(...):</caption>
097     * <tr><th>Offset</th><th>Description</th></tr>
098     * <tr><td>0</td><td><code>toUint32(bgReadingTimestampSeconds) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
099     * <tr><td>1</td><td><code>toUint32(bgReadingTimestampSeconds) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
100     * <tr><td>2</td><td><code>toUint32(bgReadingTimestampSeconds) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
101     * <tr><td>3</td><td><code>toUint32(bgReadingTimestampSeconds) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
102     * <tr><td>4</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(cgmReading) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
103     * <tr><td>5</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(cgmReading) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
104     * <tr><td>6</td><td><code>(byte) egvStatus</code></td></tr>
105     * <tr><td>7</td><td><code>(byte) trendRate</code></td></tr>
106     * </table>
107     */
108    public static byte[] buildCargo(long bgReadingTimestampSeconds, int cgmReading, int egvStatus, int trendRate) {
109        return Bytes.combine(
110            Bytes.toUint32(bgReadingTimestampSeconds),
111            Bytes.firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(cgmReading),
112            new byte[]{ (byte) egvStatus },
113            new byte[]{ (byte) trendRate });
114    }
115
116    public long getBgReadingTimestampSeconds() {
117        return bgReadingTimestampSeconds;
118    }
119
120    public int getCgmReading() {
121        return cgmReading;
122    }
123
124    public EGVStatus getEgvStatus() {
125        return EGVStatus.fromId(egvStatusId);
126    }
127
128    public int getEgvStatusId() {
129        return egvStatusId;
130    }
131
132    public int getTrendRate() {
133        return trendRate;
134    }
135}
